release_notes: NEW: Always on Top setting in widget and system tray menus. IMPROVED: Context menu styling with proper separators. FIXED: Translation system compatibility with new menu items and InvalidCastException on startup.
features: Prayer times calculation for 6 major methods
Hijri date display with ±1 day adjustment
Toast notifications with settings quick access
Duaa after Athan - Automatic spiritual duas
Cairo font support for Arabic text
Always on Top toggle in widget and system tray menus (NEW in v1.0.13)
Improved context menu styling with proper separators (NEW in v1.0.13)
Bidirectional sync between widget and tray menus (NEW in v1.0.13)
changelog: NEW: Always on Top setting in widget context menu with checkable option
NEW: Always on Top setting in system tray context menu
NEW: Bidirectional synchronization between widget and tray menus
IMPROVED: Context menu styling with proper separators instead of disabled menu items
IMPROVED: Cleaner visual appearance with reduced separator spacing
FIXED: InvalidCastException in ApplyTranslations method on startup
FIXED: Translation system compatibility with new menu structure
FIXED: Menu indices updated to handle new Always on Top item
CHANGED: Version bumped to 1.0.13 for new features
UPDATED: Installer filename changed to salaty-setup.msi
